mapper.select: select id, query_no as queryNo, pay_order_no as payOrderNo, channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, business_order_id as businessOrderId, channel_id as channelId, contract_id as contractId, query_type as queryType, request_payload as requestPayload, response_payload as responsePayload, before_status as beforeStatus, channel_status as channelStatus, result_status as resultStatus, process_result as processResult, process_message as processMessage, query_time as queryTime, tenant_id as tenantId, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_by as updatedBy, updated_at as updatedAt, del_flag as delFlag from payment_channel_query_record where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and pay_order_no = #{payOrderNo} and del_flag = 0 order by query_time desc, id desc limit 1
